creator: beloncfy@gmail.com
text:
Abnormal memory usage on "32", the server only running FreeBSD 9.2 with NFS enabled.

Detail information at the following thread: 
http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=41880

The server eventually down due to memory exhaustion.

How-To-Repeat: Hosting more than 20 VM via NFS and all the vm will perform rsync backup everynight.
